uplink.description: AC current frame: isecCurrent 178.9 mA -> power.current 0.1789 A, with vsys diagnostics and +23.5 C enclosure temp
uplink._note: Built by hand and verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Decoder) on the bytes: isecCurrent_mA 178.9 -> A /1000; temperature 23.5; powerlost 0.

uplink.description: Low DC current frame: isecCurrent 5.03 mA -> power.current 0.00503 A, negative enclosure temp -5.0 C, powerLost flag set
uplink._note: Verified against upstream Decoder: isecCurrent_mA 5.03 -> A /1000; int16 temp 0xFFCE -> -50 /10 = -5.0; powerlost 1.

uplink.description: Truncated frame (8 bytes) is rejected — the HarvyLR frame is a fixed 30 bytes
uplink._note: Below the fixed 30-byte length; codec returns an error rather than decoding garbage. Upstream would emit NaN-laden fields here.
